cycle: N91 (re-fire of N70 after N81 BFLY-const restore + N71-C div re-restore)
title: warp_reduce_sum multi-thread source-to-silicon — N91 re-fire

device.name: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5070
device.ptx_target: sm_80 (would JIT-forward to sm_120a — JIT rejected upstream)

outcome: BLOCKED_HONEST (gap C surfaced; gaps A+B closed)

compiler_source_touched.reason: Per task @D g3 honest-scope instruction 'If PTX_OP_SHFL_SYNC_BFLY_B32 still missing somehow, re-restore'. N71-C div edits were silently wiped by 7671d7db (same staging-conflict repair that wiped BFLY const). Mirrored the N81 restore class — re-applied to nvptx_target.hexa _nvptx_binop_mnemonic + _nvptx_binop_mnemonic_for_kind. Edit is uncommitted; lives only in working tree. NOT committed per task constraint 'DO NOT touch GPU.md or commit'.

falsifiers.F-RFC071-E2E-PTX-LOAD: FAIL (ptxas Arguments-mismatch on shfl; Unknown symbol %r9 %r16)

ptx_emit_substring_check.div.s32: ABSENT (kernel has no U32-dst div site; arm wired regardless)

gap_status_after_N91.GAP-C (FP64 -> u32-half decomposition fo: NEW — diagnosed; not closed. The lowering uses %r<id> for FP64 args; FP64 needs `mov.b64 {%r_lo,%r_hi},%fd_src` split + 2× shfl + recompose per PTX ISA §9.7.13.4. Fixture comment L22-25 had anticipated this gap by design.

per_warp_outputs: N/A (kernel never launched — cuModuleLoadDataEx upstream FAIL)
chain_closure: PARTIAL — 2-of-3 codegen gaps closed (A, B). The 3-gap-chain assumption in the task spec (N70 = A+B+C) was inaccurate: N71-A wired only the PTX mnemonic, not the FP64-shuffle composition wrapper. Gap C newly diagnosed via ptxas message.

follow_ons.N91_PR_N71_C_RESTORE: Commit the div.s32/div.s64/div_f32 re-restore to compiler/codegen/nvptx_target.hexa permanently (mirrors 842d6565 BFLY restore). Trivial; closes the wipe class for this RFC scope.
follow_ons.N91_PR_FP64_SHFL_WRAP: Close GAP-C: in gpu_warp_shuffle_xor lower-stmt, detect FP64 src and synthesize hi/lo u32 split + 2× shfl.sync.bfly.b32 + recompose. Reusable across N70 + future FP64 reduce kernels.

constraints_honored.cuModuleLoadDataEx: YES (used the driver-JIT API, not standalone ptxas)

cost.wall_seconds: ~300 (env + build + emit + scp + nvcc + fire + artifact update)
